nodes.name: Replay Entry
nodes.notes: Contract B replay entry. Replays the original DSAR trigger with the same correlation_id.

parameters.jsCode:
const p = $('Normalize Request').first().json;
return [{ json: { tenant_id: p.tenant_id, correlation_id: p.correlation_id, service: 'dsar', step: 'intake', status: 'rejected', payload: { request_id: p.request_id, reason: p.invalid_reason, email: p.email, type: p.type } } }];

const p = $('Normalize Request').first().json;
return [{ json: { key: p.idem_key, tenant_id: p.tenant_id, workflow: '11-dsar-privacy' } }];

const p = $('Normalize Request').first().json;
return [{ json: { tenant_id: p.tenant_id, correlation_id: p.correlation_id, service: 'dsar', step: 'intake', status: 'skipped', payload: { reason: 'duplicate request', key: p.idem_key, request_id: p.request_id, email: p.email, type: p.type } } }];

const p = $('Normalize Request').first().json;
return [{ json: { tenant_id: p.tenant_id, correlation_id: p.correlation_id, service: 'dsar', step: 'intake', status: 'started', payload: { request_id: p.request_id, email: p.email, type: p.type, source: p.replay ? 'replay' : 'webhook', execution_id: p.execution_id } } }];

const result = $('Fulfill DSAR').first().json;
return [{ json: {
  tenant_id: result.tenant_id,
  correlation_id: $('Normalize Request').first().json.correlation_id,
  service: 'dsar',
  step: 'fulfill',
  status: result.ok ? 'success' : 'error',
  payload: {
    request_id: result.request_id,
    email: result.email,
    type: result.type,
    status: result.status || 'rejected',
    matched_seat_count: result.matched_seat_count || 0,
    entitlement_count: result.entitlement_count || 0,
    invoice_count: result.invoice_count || 0,
    audit_count: result.audit_count || 0,
    suppression: result.suppression || null,
    telegram_delivered: result.telegram_delivered || false,
    notice: result.notice || null,
    evidence: result.evidence || null
  }
} }];
